name: kkirikkiri-codex
description: Codex-native agent team assembly and shared-memory orchestration for delegated work.

interface.shortDescription: Assemble and run a Codex-native agent team
interface.longDescription: Package the Codex-native `kkirikkiri` workflow with curated prompt references, shared-memory helpers, and chat-first clarification rules for delegated multi-agent work.
defaultPrompt: Assemble a small Codex-native team to research this topic and keep the lead role local.
Split this delegated coding request into a lead plus bounded worker roles with shared memory.
Use kkirikkiri to run a research or analysis team and produce a final team report.
